series_metadata.series_description: Documents pertaining to public records requests including but not limited to the original request, correspondence between staff and requestor or other staff, redacted and unredacted responsive records, acknowledgement letters, response letters. Maintained to document compliance with public records laws obligations (ORC149.43). Certain confidential data may be contained in the documentation prior to redaction.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 10 years, then destroy ; Electronic: Retain 10 years, then destroy, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
